title: An Act to Protect Natural Resources by Clarifying Hydropower Dam Removal Requirements
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.

actions.description: Committee on Environment and Natural Resources suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
